stars.description: Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for AI coding agents

xPosts.content: It gives me a lot of comfort knowing that we are the last generation without advanced robots everywhere.
xPosts.highlights: Reflects on the imminent ubiquity of advanced robots, suggesting a future where robots are commonplace.
xPosts.worthReading: Provides a personal perspective on the rapid advancement of robotics and its societal impact.

xPosts.content: Resource constraints are a beautiful thing. Survival instinct in a cut-throat AI competitive land.
xPosts.highlights: Views resource constraints as a positive force driving innovation and survival in AI competition.
xPosts.worthReading: Offers insight into the mindset of a leading AI researcher on competition and resourcefulness.

xPosts.content: In this context, I define world modeling as predicting the next plausible world state (or a longer duration of states) conditioned on an action.
xPosts.highlights: Defines world modeling in the context of AI and robotics as predicting future states based on actions.
xPosts.worthReading: Clarifies a key concept in AI research that underpins many advanced models.

xPosts.content: In this context, I define world modeling as predicting the next plausible world state (or a longer duration of states) conditioned on an action.

xPosts.worthReading: It clarifies a foundational concept for understanding world models in AI.
